one_time_description: Settlement proceeds received in fiscal 2024 with no comparative amount in prior year
economic_notes: Band holds 25% in Pelltiq't Energy Group and 51% in Whispering Pines/A&T Limited Liability Partnership; both excluded from consolidation due to no active operations. Assets under construction include Westsyde Multi-Use Pathway ($1,337,316) and Site 2A Revetment ($66,736).
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED for two reasons: (1) PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations not assessed as of audit date; (2) 25% interest in Pelltiq't Energy Group and 51% interest in Whispering Pines/A&T Limited Liability Partnership excluded from consolidation due to no active operations and no audited financials available. Only one subsidiary (Social Housing) is consolidated. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC ($1,598,560) + CMHC ($24,387) + First Nations Health Authority ($39,470) + Province of BC ($374,273) + First Nations Education Steering Committee ($118,632) = $2,155,322 — note Qwemtsin Health Society ($128,542) and BC First Nations Gaming ($333,198) may also be government transfers bringing total to $2,616,862 depending on classification; figures used here include ISC + CMHC + FNHA + Province of BC + FNESS/FNESC only. expenses_housing combines Housing-band owned ($294,708) and Social Housing ($22,970). No schedule of remuneration included in the document. Honorarium of $214,699 noted in expenses by object which may relate to Chief and Council.
